trigger.value: this website uses cookies && accept cookies

actions.code: return (async () => { const norm = (value) => String(value || '').replace(/\s+/g, ' ').trim().toLowerCase(); const isVisible = (el) => { if (!el || !el.isConnected) return false; try { const style = window.getComputedStyle(el); if (style.display === 'none' || style.visibility === 'hidden' || style.pointerEvents === 'none') return false; return el.getClientRects().length > 0; } catch (e) { return false; } }; const clickEl = (el) => { if (!isVisible(el)) return false; try { el.click(); return true; } catch (e) {} try { el.dispatchEvent(new MouseEvent('click', { bubbles: true, cancelable: true, view: window })); return true; } catch (e) {} return false; }; const getLabel = (el) => norm(el.innerText || el.textContent || el.value || el.getAttribute('aria-label') || el.getAttribute('title') || ''); const allClickables = () => Array.from(document.querySelectorAll('button, [role="button"], input[type="button"], input[type="submit"], a')); const findByTexts = (texts) => { for (const el of allClickables()) { const label = getLabel(el); if (!label) continue; if (texts.some((text) => label === text || label.includes(text))) return el; } return null; }; const findCloseButton = () => { const selectors = ['button[aria-label*="close" i]', 'button[title*="close" i]', '[role="button"][aria-label*="close" i]', '[aria-label*="dismiss" i]']; for (const selector of selectors) { const el = document.querySelector(selector); if (isVisible(el)) return el; } return findByTexts(['×', 'close']); }; const hasBanner = () => { const text = norm(document.body && (document.body.innerText || document.body.textContent || '')); return text.includes('this website uses cookies') && text.includes('accept cookies'); }; const deadline = Date.now() + 8000; while (Date.now() < deadline) { const accept = findByTexts(['accept cookies', 'accept all cookies']); if (accept && clickEl(accept)) return { ok: true, result: 'cookie_accept_clicked' }; const close = findCloseButton(); if (close && clickEl(close)) return { ok: true, result: 'cookie_popup_closed' }; if (!hasBanner()) return { ok: true, result: 'cookie_banner_missing' }; await new Promise((resolve) => setTimeout(resolve, 250)); } return { ok: false, result: 'cookie_popup_not_ready' }; })()

return (() => { const text = String((document.body && (document.body.innerText || document.body.textContent)) || '').replace(/\s+/g, ' ').trim().toLowerCase(); const visible = text.includes('this website uses cookies') && text.includes('accept cookies'); return visible ? { ok: false, result: 'cookie_banner_still_visible' } : { ok: true, result: 'cookie_banner_cleared' }; })()

return (async () => { const findClickableButton = () => { const btn = document.querySelector('button.temp-chat-button'); if (!(btn instanceof HTMLButtonElement) || !btn.isConnected) return null; const style = window.getComputedStyle(btn); const hidden = btn.getClientRects().length === 0 || style.display === 'none' || style.visibility === 'hidden'; if (btn.disabled || hidden) return null; return btn; }; const deadline = Date.now() + 10000; while (Date.now() < deadline) { const btn = findClickableButton(); if (btn) { btn.click(); return 'temp_chat_button_clicked'; } await new Promise(resolve => setTimeout(resolve, 250)); } return 'temp_chat_button_timeout'; })()

commands.name: 临时对话异常空白检测

actions.code: return (() => { try { const reset = (value) => { delete window.__geminiTempChatBlankSince; return value; }; const href = String(window.location.href || ''); if (!/[?&]pageId=none\b/i.test(href)) return reset('GEMINI_TEMP_CHAT_SKIP'); const vw = window.innerWidth || document.documentElement.clientWidth || 0; const vh = window.innerHeight || document.documentElement.clientHeight || 0; const isVisible = (el) => { if (!(el instanceof HTMLElement) || !el.isConnected) return false; const rect = el.getBoundingClientRect(); if (rect.width < 1 || rect.height < 1) return false; if (rect.bottom <= 0 || rect.right <= 0 || rect.top >= vh || rect.left >= vw) return false; const style = window.getComputedStyle(el); return style.display !== 'none' && style.visibility !== 'hidden' && Number(style.opacity || '1') > 0.05; }; for (const el of Array.from(document.querySelectorAll('[role="progressbar"], [aria-busy="true"]'))) { if (isVisible(el)) return reset('GEMINI_TEMP_CHAT_LOADING'); } const inputSelectors = ['textarea', '[contenteditable="true"]', '[role="textbox"]', 'input[type="text"]']; const composerHints = []; let hasComposer = false; for (const el of Array.from(document.querySelectorAll(inputSelectors.join(',')))) { if (!isVisible(el)) continue; const rect = el.getBoundingClientRect(); if (rect.width < Math.max(280, vw * 0.22) || rect.height < 28 || rect.top < vh * 0.35) continue; hasComposer = true; composerHints.push(el.getAttribute('placeholder') || '', el.getAttribute('aria-label') || '', 'value' in el ? (el.value || '') : '', el.innerText || el.textContent || ''); } if (!hasComposer) return reset('GEMINI_TEMP_CHAT_SKIP'); const normalize = (value) => String(value || '').replace(/\s+/g, ' ').trim().toLowerCase(); const allText = normalize((document.body?.innerText || document.documentElement?.innerText || '') + ' ' + composerHints.join(' ')); if (!allText.includes('gemini')) return reset('GEMINI_TEMP_CHAT_SKIP'); const normalMarkers = ['临时对话', '临时对话不会显示在近期对话', 'gemini 应用活动记录中', '通过临时对话提问']; const normalHits = normalMarkers.filter(marker => allText.includes(marker.toLowerCase())).length; if (normalHits >= 2) return reset('GEMINI_TEMP_CHAT_OK'); const brokenHints = ['问问 gemini', '问问 gemini 3', 'ask gemini']; const hasBrokenHint = brokenHints.some(marker => allText.includes(marker)); if (!hasBrokenHint && normalHits > 0) return reset('GEMINI_TEMP_CHAT_OK'); const now = Date.now(); const since = Number(window.__geminiTempChatBlankSince || 0); if (!since) { window.__geminiTempChatBlankSince = now; return 'GEMINI_TEMP_CHAT_PENDING'; } if ((now - since) < 5000) return 'GEMINI_TEMP_CHAT_PENDING'; window.__geminiTempChatBlankSince = now; return 'GEMINI_TEMP_CHAT_BLANK'; } catch (error) { delete window.__geminiTempChatBlankSince; return 'GEMINI_TEMP_CHAT_PROBE_ERROR'; } })()

return (() => { try { const norm = (v) => String(v || '').replace(/\s+/g, ' ').trim().toLowerCase(); const isVisible = (el) => { if (!(el instanceof HTMLElement) || !el.isConnected) return false; const rect = el.getBoundingClientRect(); if (rect.width < 1 || rect.height < 1) return false; const style = window.getComputedStyle(el); return style.display !== 'none' && style.visibility !== 'hidden' && Number(style.opacity || '1') > 0.05; }; const sidebarExpanded = Array.from(document.querySelectorAll('nav, aside, [role="navigation"]')).some((el) => { if (!isVisible(el)) return false; const rect = el.getBoundingClientRect(); if (rect.left > 60 || rect.width < 160) return false; const text = norm(el.innerText || el.textContent || ''); return text.includes('聊天历史记录') || text.includes('设置和帮助') || text.includes('升级vip') || text.includes('了解详情'); }); if (sidebarExpanded) return 'SIDEBAR_ALREADY_EXPANDED'; const target = document.querySelector('button[data-test-id="side-nav-menu-button"][aria-label="主菜单"]'); if (!(target instanceof HTMLElement) || !isVisible(target)) return 'SIDEBAR_TOGGLE_NOT_FOUND'; target.click(); return 'SIDEBAR_EXPANDED'; } catch (error) { return 'SIDEBAR_EXPAND_ERROR:' + String(error).slice(0, 120); } })()

trigger.value: terms of use && privacy policy && by clicking && agree

actions.code: return (() => { try { const candidates = Array.from(document.querySelectorAll('button, [role="button"], input[type="button"], input[type="submit"]')); const target = candidates.find(el => { const text = (el.innerText || el.value || el.getAttribute('aria-label') || '').trim().toLowerCase(); if (!text) return false; if (text !== 'agree') return false; const rect = el.getBoundingClientRect(); const style = window.getComputedStyle(el); return rect.width > 0 && rect.height > 0 && style.display !== 'none' && style.visibility !== 'hidden' && !el.disabled; }); let outcome = 'AGREE_BUTTON_NOT_FOUND'; if (target) { target.click(); outcome = 'AGREE_CLICKED'; } window.__arenaAgreePopupLastClick = outcome; return outcome; } catch (e) { const outcome = 'AGREE_CLICK_FAILED:' + e; window.__arenaAgreePopupLastClick = outcome; return outcome; } })()

return (() => { try { const clickOutcome = String(window.__arenaAgreePopupLastClick || '').trim(); const candidates = Array.from(document.querySelectorAll('button, [role="button"], input[type="button"], input[type="submit"], [role="dialog"], [data-radix-popper-content-wrapper]')); const hasVisiblePopup = candidates.some(el => { const text = (el.innerText || el.value || el.getAttribute('aria-label') || '').toLowerCase(); if (!(text.includes('terms of use') && text.includes('privacy policy') && text.includes('agree'))) return false; const rect = el.getBoundingClientRect(); const style = window.getComputedStyle(el); return rect.width > 0 && rect.height > 0 && style.display !== 'none' && style.visibility !== 'hidden'; }); if (!hasVisiblePopup) return 'AGREE_DISMISSED'; if (clickOutcome === 'AGREE_CLICKED') return 'AGREE_WAITING_AFTER_CLICK'; if (clickOutcome.startsWith('AGREE_CLICK_FAILED:') || clickOutcome === 'AGREE_BUTTON_NOT_FOUND') return 'AGREE_REFRESH_NEEDED'; return 'AGREE_STILL_VISIBLE'; } catch (e) { return 'AGREE_PROBE_FAILED:' + e; } })()

return (() => { try { const clickOutcome = String(window.__arenaAgreePopupLastClick || '').trim(); const candidates = Array.from(document.querySelectorAll('button, [role="button"], input[type="button"], input[type="submit"], [role="dialog"], [data-radix-popper-content-wrapper]')); const hasVisiblePopup = candidates.some(el => { const text = (el.innerText || el.value || el.getAttribute('aria-label') || '').toLowerCase(); if (!(text.includes('terms of use') && text.includes('privacy policy') && text.includes('agree'))) return false; const rect = el.getBoundingClientRect(); const style = window.getComputedStyle(el); return rect.width > 0 && rect.height > 0 && style.display !== 'none' && style.visibility !== 'hidden'; }); if (!hasVisiblePopup) return 'AGREE_DISMISSED'; if (clickOutcome === 'AGREE_CLICKED') return 'AGREE_REFRESH_NEEDED'; if (clickOutcome.startsWith('AGREE_CLICK_FAILED:') || clickOutcome === 'AGREE_BUTTON_NOT_FOUND') return 'AGREE_REFRESH_NEEDED'; return 'AGREE_STILL_VISIBLE'; } catch (e) { return 'AGREE_PROBE_FAILED:' + e; } })()

actions.prompt: 请只回复：DeepSeek页面直发命令已配置完成。

commands.name: ARENA_EVERY4_ROTATE_IP
commands.script:
import json as _json
import time as _time
import urllib.parse
import requests

raise_if_cancelled()
CLASH_API = 'http://127.0.0.1:9097'.rstrip('/')
CLASH_SECRET = '1'
SELECTOR_CANDIDATES = ['\u826f\u5fc3\u4e91', 'GLOBAL']
WHITELIST = [
    '\U0001f1ed\U0001f1f0\u9999\u6e2f\u4e13\u7ebf02|BGP|\u6d41\u5a92\u4f53',
    '\U0001f1ed\U0001f1f0\u9999\u6e2f\u9ad8\u901f02|BGP|\u6d41\u5a92\u4f53',
    '\U0001f1ed\U0001f1f0\u9999\u6e2f\u4e13\u7ebf03|BGP|\u6d41\u5a92\u4f53',
    '\U0001f1f8\U0001f1ec\u65b0\u52a0\u5761\u9ad8\u901f06|BGP|\u6d41\u5a92\u4f53',
    '\U0001f1ef\U0001f1f5\u65e5\u672c\u4e13\u7ebf02|BGP|\u6d41\u5a92\u4f53',
    '\U0001f1f8\U0001f1ec\u65b0\u52a0\u5761\u4e13\u7ebf03|BGP|\u6d41\u5a92\u4f53',
    '\U0001f1f8\U0001f1ec\u65b0\u52a0\u5761\u9ad8\u901f03|BGP|\u6d41\u5a92\u4f53',
    '\U0001f1f8\U0001f1ec\u65b0\u52a0\u5761\u9ad8\u901f04|BGP|\u6d41\u5a92\u4f53',
]
headers = {'Content-Type': 'application/json'}
if CLASH_SECRET:
    headers['Authorization'] = f'Bearer {CLASH_SECRET}'

selector_name = ''
selector_url = ''
selector_data = None
last_error = ''
for candidate in SELECTOR_CANDIDATES:
    raise_if_cancelled()
    try:
        url = CLASH_API + '/proxies/' + urllib.parse.quote(candidate, safe='')
        resp = requests.get(url, headers=headers, timeout=5)
        resp.raise_for_status()
        data = resp.json()
        allowed = [name for name in WHITELIST if name in (data.get('all') or [])]
        if not allowed:
            last_error = f'no_whitelist_nodes_in_selector:{candidate}'
            continue
        selector_name = candidate
        selector_url = url
        selector_data = data
        break
    except Exception as exc:
        last_error = f'{candidate}:{exc}'

if not selector_data:
    result = _json.dumps({'ok': False, 'error': last_error or 'selector_unavailable'}, ensure_ascii=False)
else:
    raise_if_cancelled()
    allowed = [name for name in WHITELIST if name in (selector_data.get('all') or [])]
    current = str(selector_data.get('now') or '')
    next_node = allowed[(allowed.index(current) + 1) % len(allowed)] if current in allowed else allowed[0]
    if next_node == current:
        result = _json.dumps({'ok': True, 'switched': False, 'selector': selector_name, 'node': current, 'pool_size': len(allowed)}, ensure_ascii=False)
    else:
        switch_resp = requests.put(selector_url, json={'name': next_node}, headers=headers, timeout=5)
        switch_resp.raise_for_status()
        logger.info(f'[CMD] Arena IP rotate: {selector_name} {current} -> {next_node}')
        try:
            _time.sleep(1.0)
            tab.refresh()
            _time.sleep(2.0)
        except Exception as refresh_exc:
            logger.warning(f'[CMD] Arena IP rotate refresh failed: {refresh_exc}')
        result = _json.dumps({'ok': True, 'switched': True, 'selector': selector_name, 'from': current, 'to': next_node, 'pool_size': len(allowed)}, ensure_ascii=False)
